subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, the All-Affectionate, and by Thy Name, the All-Compassionate, and by Thy Name through which Thou didst open [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک العطوف و باسمک الروف و باسمک الذی به فتحت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God
